utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan specifies 'Unified Health Coverage combining PrimeCare Premium (physical) and EliteCare Premium (mental)' and gives a total cost (€320/month). It does not provide separate costs for physical vs mental, but the format only requires costs overall; it does mention both physical and mental coverage. Considered fully specified. 2) property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan specifies 'EliteHome Premium Coverage at €95/month, consolidating home contents and additional luxury asset protection' — includes home/contents and cost. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Plan specifies 'EliteTravel Premium Plan at €115/month' with coverage descriptors — includes cost. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan provides 'Family Insurance Concierge service at €50/month' — includes cost. Fully specified. 5) total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides 'Total optimized monthly cost: €580/month'. It gives monthly total but not annual; the requirement says monthly/annual cost breakdown, implying either monthly and/or annual is acceptable as a complete breakdown. The wording 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown' could imply both should be present. Only monthly is provided. This may be considered incomplete. Therefore 4 are clearly fully specified; the total_budget item is partially specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four items: a combined health coverage using PrimeCare Premium (physical) and EliteCare Premium (mental), EliteHome Premium Coverage for property, EliteTravel Premium Plan for travel, and a Family Insurance Concierge service. From the ground-truth ratings, the relevant items are: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health, rating 10), EliteCare Premium Plan (mental health, rating 10), EliteHome Premium Coverage (home content/property, rating 10), and EliteTravel Premium Plan (travel insurance, rating 10). The 'Family Insurance Concierge service' is not present in the ground-truth ratings under any category, so it cannot be mapped.

final_package_text:
{
  "health_coverage": "Unified Health Coverage combining PrimeCare Premium (physical) and EliteCare Premium (mental) at a total of €320/month, offering global support, 24/7 care, and bundled administrative efficiencies.",
  "property_coverage": "EliteHome Premium Coverage at €95/month, consolidating home contents and additional luxury asset protection with streamlined claims support.",
  "travel_coverage": "EliteTravel Premium Plan at €115/month, delivering global premium medical network access, 24/7 concierge support, enhanced trip cancellation/interruption coverage, and tailored benefits for upscale accommodations (including support for the Algarve Resort booking).",
  "additional_services": "Family Insurance Concierge service at €50/month to coordinate all policy elements and provide ongoing support.",
  "total_budget": "Total optimized monthly cost: €580/month"
}
